                        News

                        India Today TV

                        PM inaugurates India's fastest metro in Meerut, entire Namo Bharat corridor

                        PM Narendra Modi today inaugurated the remaining sections of India's first Namo Bharat RRTS, which include the 5-km section between Sarai Kale Khan and New Ashok Nagar in Delhi and the 21-km section between Meerut South and Modipuram.

                        • PM opens 5-km Delhi stretch, 21-km Meerut portion of RRTS
                        • 82-km RRTS line connects Delhi with Ghaziabad and Meerut
                        • Meerut Metro, India's fastest, covers 23 km with 13 stations

                        India News

                        Delhi Police bust Lashkar-linked terror module; 8 arrested from Tamil Nadu, Bengal

                        The terror module has links to Pakistan's ISI and Bangladesh-based extremist groups and was allegedly planning a major attack in India, police said.

                        GURUGRAM

                        Sanitiser on private parts, set ablaze: Teen attacked by partner narrates horror

                        A 19-year-old Tripura woman, who was allegedly attacked by her live-in partner in Gurugram, has alleged that the accused poured sanitiser on her private parts and set it on fire, and assaulted her with a knife for three days.

                        News Analysis

                        Inside Epstein empire: Sex abuse and the billionaire boys' club

                        He built a glittering empire of wealth and influence, and hid a machinery of abuse behind its gates. When the walls finally cracked, the fallout reached presidents, princes and billionaires who once moved freely through his world. But how did Jeffrey Epstein build, finance and shield one of the most notorious sex-trafficking networks in modern history? Here is a detailed look inside the evil empire.

                        Sunday Special

                        Gutter, but of gold. Why Dharavi slums charge Rs 5 lakh rent a month

                        The towers of Mumbai have seen kilometres of expanse of Dharavi's asbestos and tin roofs for decades. Most pity the slums as a place that is deprived of the basics, while others romanticise them. As Asia's largest shanty town stands at the cusp of a major overhaul, it's humming with enterprise. Beyond the filth, Dharavi runs businesses that generate a billion dollars a year.

                        India News

                        Was critical of PM after Godhra, but Gujarat visit changed views: Bihar Governor

                        Bihar Governor Arif Mohammed Khan said he had criticised then-chief minister of Gujarat Narendra Modi after the 2002 Godhra unrest but changed his view after spending over four months in Gujarat interacting with people from different communities.

                        India News

                        2 sisters, set to get married on same day, die by suicide in Jodhpur

                        A relative has alleged family pressure behind the incident, while police have registered a case of unnatural death and launched an investigation.

                        T20 World Cup

                        The tale of two Indias: Surya offers rare glimpse into the team's other side

                        IND vs SA, T20 World Cup: Suryakumar Yadav's Indian team begin their Super 8 campaign against South Africa on Sunday. Here is a rare glimpse into a side of the Indian team that is often unseen, beyond their confident and bullish persona on the global stage. Observations in Ahmedabad, however, suggest a group that is far more grounded, introspective, and measured than their dominant image suggests.

                        How pet travel in India is going paw-sitive

                        After railways made carrying pets less of a hassle, Akasa Air has thrown its cabins wide open for what is now emerging as serious business in travel

                        Cricket

                        Chasing Virat Kohli, losing themselves: Pakistan stars who faded away

                        Pakistan has produced several cricketers, including Babar Azam, who were compared to Virat Kohli. While many made impressive starts to their careers, most struggled to demonstrate the level of consistency and dedication that Kohli has maintained over the years at the highest level of cricket.

                        SUNDAY SPECIAL

                        Darkness redux: Anurag Kashyap is back on the neo-noir trail with Kennedy

                        Handcrafted ByOur Editors

                        After over half a decade when he played the field with more mainstream subjects, Anurag Kashyap's new release, Kennedy, marks his return to the neo-noir genre.

                        Tamil Nadu News

                        Tamil Nadu law & order in shambles: BJP tears into MK Stalin after terror arrests

                        Six terror suspects were arrested from Tamil Nadu's Tiruppur on Sunday. The BJP launched a scathing attack on Chief Minister M K Stalin, alleging that the state has become a breeding ground for terrorism under the DMK's rule.

                        T20 World Cup

                        India, South Africa set for Super 8 showdown in 2024 final rematch

                        T20 World Cup: India take on South Africa in their first Super 8 clash in the T20 World Cup. In Ahmedabad's cricketing circles, this is being billed as the toughest challenge for India yet in this World Cup.

                        Handcrafted ByOur Editors

                        Repeated Pak attacks can't mask its internal crisis: Afghanistan vows retaliation

                        Afghanistan criticised Pakistan for carrying out airstrikes on terror targets inside its territory that it said killed dozens of civilians, warning that repeated attacks by Islamabad would not conceal its internal crisis.

                        Sam Altman says some companies are using AI as excuse to fire employees

                        OpenAI CEO, Sam Altman, has claimed that while AI is impacting jobs, many companies are using it as an excuse to fire people, a method he calls, "AI washing."

                        Eric Dane's girlfriend Janell Shirtcliff posts romantic photos in emotional tribute
